Video.summary: With a new principal in town, Rhyme and the Chicken Girls must band together to save the dance.
Video.title: Chicken Girls The Movie

Video.summary: Harmony helps Rhyme make up her mind, and Flash goes out for the team.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: In the season finale, the Attaway team faces stiff competition.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: It's a new year in Attaway. TK picks up where he left off and Rhyme makes a new friend.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: Ellie finds unlikely support on the debate team. Tensions rise as Rhyme's new friendship with Gemma blossoms.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: Birdie’s new relationship takes an unexpected turn. A scandal leaves everyone suspicious of Robby.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: Rhyme takes on a big role in the musical. Things get spooky at Ace's Halloween party.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: After the Scavenger Hunt debacle, Nellie returns to Crown Lake with a vengeance.
Video.title: Crown Lake

Video.summary: A friend has some ulterior motives, a crush is just a misunderstanding and an enemy tries to become her ally.
Video.title: Zoe Valentine

Video.summary: Zoe sets things straight with Riggs and Boots comes clean to Isaac.
Video.title: Zoe Valentine

Video.summary: Gemma gives Rhyme a fake ID. TK and Wes hold auditions for their upcoming movie project.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: Rhyme and Astrid set aside their disagreements. Ellie does her best to help Quinn get over Hamilton.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: Astrid's mother comes to visit. Birdie and Rooney deal with the confusing reality of their relationships.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: Rooney makes an important announcement at her photo gallery while Rhyme confronts her own drama.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: Without her older sister, Zoe finds herself in the spotlight for the first time.
Video.title: Zoe Valentine

Video.summary: Zoe comes face-to-face with her sister's secret life.
Video.title: Zoe Valentine

Video.summary: Zoe immerses herself in extracurriculars as her family drama escalates.
Video.title: Zoe Valentine

Video.summary: Zoe Valentine goes back to school, but things are still far from back to normal.
Video.title: Zoe Valentine

Video.summary: Zoe confides in Autumn about her dream and what it might mean for her relationship with Brody.
Video.title: Zoe Valentine

Video.summary: After a series of mishaps, Rhyme, Autumn, Zoe, and Effie find themselves together in Miami for spring break.
Video.title: Spring Breakaway

Video.summary: Nellie and Josh hit it off until she learns about long-standing and controversial rule during Treasure Hunt.
Video.title: Crown Lake

Video.summary: Rhyme & her friends have always danced together, but this year - there's only three spots on the team.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: The Chicken Girls are back! Friends new and old come together for Ace's big bash.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: Ellie is pulled in two directions, as the Dance Team battles Power Surge in the season finale.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: The gang encounters new faces in California, while back home a plan is hatched.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: Back home, the girls go door-to-door to save the Arcade, while Rhyme and T.K. explore new passions on break.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: With time running out, the girls of Attaway stage a last ditch effort to save the Arcade.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: At sign-ups in Millwood, the girls are thrown a curveball. Tim scores a juicy scoop.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: On their first day of high school, Rhyme and T. K. face difficult choices.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: New extracurriculars pull Rhyme and Ellie in unexpected directions.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: A disastrous double date and a returning leading lady put two relationships in jeopardy.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: Everyone comes together for Thanksgiving. The Chicken Girls take on the Queen B's at the Winter Formal.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: A home economics project whips up drama for the girls. One of the Chicken Girls says goodbye to Attaway.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: Rhyme accidentally becomes the leader of Attaway's feminist movement.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: The Chicken Girls are fed up with the boys in their lives. Rooney's party prompts break-ups and make-ups.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: Quinn invites Rhyme, Luna, and the girls to an escape room. Robbie and the boys have bro-time.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: Rhyme takes a hard look at her relationship with Ezra. Rooney considers a new love interest.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: Rhyme's cousin, Astrid, revisits her past in Attaway. Rooney begins to question the state of her love life.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: Quinn has a tough time moving on after a break-up. Texts shed light on Rooney's dilemma with Stephanie.
Video.title: Chicken Girls

Video.summary: Nellie Chambers has a rough first day at Crown Lake Academy.
Video.title: Crown Lake

Video.summary: At Crown Lake, dirt gives you power. But, is having power at the Academy worth losing a potential.
Video.title: Crown Lake

Video.summary: Georgia, Kit, Rosie, and Jack spend their 1st day on the job at Attaway General.
Video.title: “TVs”

Video.summary: Jack and Holden bond, Kit proves she's the best volunteer, Georgia gets a warning about Will.
Video.title: The Sugar Kingdom

Video.summary: Secrets are revealed and the volunteers are tested by a VIP patient.
Video.title: Small Hospital

Video.summary: Things don’t go as planned when Georgia and Kit throw an impromptu prom for all the patients and volunteers.
Video.title: “Going Under”
